sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22286" key="gleukagwgo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλευκ-ᾰγωγός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n22286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for carrying new wine</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βύρσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
